title: Wreckfest
notes: Single Player seemingly works fine. Multiplayer server browser hangs. Doesn't detect refresh rates above 60Hz, though can push higher FPS using G-Sync. Have to lower settings for FPS parity with Windows.

title: Wreckfest
notes:
Performance: game runs good to okay.

Tested: 4 banger races, which went fine, some FPS drops, but overall was playable. 
Also did 1 demolition derby: this is really hard on my FPS, lots of FPS drops, this is just about playable.

Game didn't crash or have any other graphical glitches/audio glitches. So the game was stable in that regard for me.

title: Wreckfest
notes: single player works perfectly fine but multiplayer hangs, only 64-bit version works

title: Wreckfest
notes: Tried both 32 bit and 64bit options, 64 bit is giving out a failure to detect graphics device

title: Wreckfest
notes: The after race menu/results did not render correctly, but completely usable. Slightly low framerate at 3440x1440. Usually 30+, but could drop into 20's with lots going on. No other issues to report after 2 hours ingame.

title: Wreckfest
notes: Some graphic glitches in the Menus and some stutters across the game.

title: Wreckfest
notes: Stable no crashes, but has some graphical glitches in game.

title: Wreckfest
notes: white rectangle glitch in the menus, but in the background

title: Wreckfest
notes: Couldn't get it to run until I specifically selected Proton 3.7-3 in the Steam Play options. Everything seems to work, but performance is quite a lot worse than in Windows. (Note that Solus doesn't have LLVM 7 yet, though)
Runs great, no issues
title: Wreckfest

notes: works fine since 3.7.6
title: Wreckfest

notes: Steam loads the game for a while, but then nothing happens. Same for both 64 bits and 32 bits versions.
title: Wreckfest

notes: Runs well. Performance isn't perfect, but I can't compare to windows.
title: Wreckfest

notes: Singleplayer is fine no issues during complete carreer- Multiplayer freezes game in multiplayer lobby, unable to close game only with killing process
title: Wreckfest

notes: Single player is perfect.  Multiplayer freezes at the server menu as others have stated.
title: Wreckfest

gpu: X.Org Radeon RX 570 Series (POLARIS10, DRM 3.27.0, 4.19.0-1-MANJARO, LLVM 6.0.1)
notes: Runs perfectly except for graphical glitches
title: Wreckfest

gpu: X.Org AMD Radeon (TM) RX 460 Graphics (POLARIS11, DRM 3.26.0, 4.18.0-sabayon, LLVM 7.0.0)
notes: Some graphical glitches but playable. Also noticed that my career wasn't synced from Windows.
title: Wreckfest

notes: Worked out of the "box". Great framrates some minor glitch in the menu and when the race is done. otherwise very much playable.
title: Wreckfest

notes: completed singleplayer and played multiplayer via lan and net, no issues detected
title: Wreckfest

notes: The game launches and is fully playable, however the game suffers from massive texture issues making it very difficult to play. Texture transparency does not work proper, and other textures including entire segments of the floor are messing. Issue is likely related to the Mesa driver lacking recent Vulkan features.
title: Wreckfest

notes: Multiplayer menu freezes, some artefacts on single player menu, otherwise perfect
title: Wreckfest

notes:
There are graphical glitches on grass, trees, background crowd, and ground reflections. The race track and cars display correctly and the game is playable.
  |  
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q5ojTVC-00g
title: Wreckfest

notes: There are graphical glitches on grass, trees, background crowd, and ground reflections. The race track and cars display correctly and the game is playable. Some race tracks with lots of trees and crowd are hard to play due to the graphical glitch. Downgrading my rating from SILVER to BRONZE.
title: Wreckfest

notes: started off with a fresh installed copy, never played the game before on windows. launched perfectly right after install, laucher displayed graphical settings, game starts without errors. Graphic options all work, playing everything on high with my GTX960. started career mode and finished the first chapter and leveled up to Lvl 10. Mods, Tuning, everything seems to work perfectly without any tweaks!
title: Wreckfest

notes: Still has graphical glitches on grass, trees, ground reflections, and background crowd. Vehicles and debris display correctly.
